name: herder
description: Create, manage, and execute dependency-aware implementation plans with reviewed multi-agent integration.

interface.shortDescription: Create and execute plans with specialized agents.
interface.longDescription: Herder audits repositories, manages a local dependency-aware plan backlog, independently reviews candidates, rescues failures, and integrates verified work transactionally.
defaultPrompt: Install Herder's agent roles for this project.
Audit this repository and create prioritized Herder plans.
Fire the implementation plans in this repository.
